data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The proposed alias propagation across KnotRecord/Beat/WaveBeat/BeatDependency and most view surfaces is directionally correct, but it misses a real waves-route bug: /api/waves currently checks dep.dependency_type for 'blocks' even though listDependencies emits dependency_type='blocked_by' and type='blocks', so blockedBy/readiness data will stay wrong unless that extraction logic is corrected as part of the plan. The relationship-picker step is also underspecified because selected badges only get selectedIds today; the revised plan should define how aliases are resolved for already-selected IDs and include test coverage for that component.
